title: U54 SCENT 10x Genomic Single-Cell Multiome
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5joeb","text":"This document outlines the 10X Genomics Single-Cell Multiome Protocol used for normal lung and colon tissues for SCENT at Duke University.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Nuclei were isolated using this 10x Genomics kit - ChromiumNuclei Isolation with RNase Inhibitor Kit, 16rxns, and this protocol
Multiome libraries were generated using these kits -Chromium Next GEM Single Cell Multiome ATAC + Gene Expression Reagent Bundle and this protocol

Libraries were sequenced on Illumina sequencers to a read depth of at least 50k reads/nucleus for Gene Expression with read lengths of 28x10x10x90 and at least 25k reads/nucleus for ATAC with read lengths of 50x8x24x49.
creator: Valerie Bekker
